app.title: LibreOffice Impress Remote
aria.currentSlideTap: Current slide. Tap to go to the next slide.
crypto.error.blockLength: AES blocks must be 16 bytes long.
crypto.error.keyLength: AES-GCM keys must be 16, 24, or 32 bytes long.
crypto.error.nonceLength: AES-GCM nonces must be 12 bytes long.
crypto.error.p256PrivateKey: P-256 private key is out of range.
crypto.error.tagLength: AES-GCM tags must be 16 bytes long.
error.configJson: Configuration payload must be valid JSON.
error.commandIndex: Command index must be an integer.
error.commandName: Command name must be a string.
error.directCommandFrame: Direct IPv6 command payload is not a command frame.
error.directCommandMissing: Direct IPv6 command payload is missing a valid command.
error.directSessionUnauthorized: Direct local session request is not paired with this remote session.
error.impressRequired: The active LibreOffice document is not an Impress presentation.
error.localFallbackLanOnly: Local compatibility transport is only available to local-network clients.
error.localFallbackUnauthorized: Local compatibility request is not paired with this remote session.
error.localPortRange: Preferred local port must be a number from 1 to 65535.
error.noNextSlideExport: No next slide is available to export.
error.noPairingRoute: No pairing route is available yet.
error.noPairingUrl: No pairing URL is available for this route.
error.noSlideExport: No slide is available to export.
error.openPreviewFailed: LibreOffice could not open the remote preview.
error.relayUrlHost: Relay URL must include a host
error.remoteRouteRequired: Enable at least one pairing route before starting the remote.
error.payloadJson: Payload must be a JSON object.
error.slidePreviewExport: LibreOffice did not export the slide preview.
localServer.directIPv6.disabled: Direct IPv6 pairing is disabled in LibreOffice settings.
localServer.directIPv6.listenerUnavailab: LibreOffice could not start a direct IPv6 listener. Check whether the desktop IPv6 stack or firewall is blocking inbound connections.
localServer.directIPv6.noGlobalAddress: No globally reachable IPv6 address was detected. Link-local and unique-local IPv6 addresses are ignored, and many hotspots or routers do not provide public IPv6.
localServer.directIPv6.ready: Direct IPv6 is ready. Phones must also have working public IPv6 to reach this computer from the internet.
localServer.directIPv6.selfTestFailed: Public IPv6 addresses were found, but LibreOffice could not reach its own IPv6 listener on port {port}. Check the desktop firewall, router IPv6 firewall, or hotspot restrictions.
localServer.hint.directIPv6: Scan the QR code to pair over direct IPv6. Both the phone and this computer need working public IPv6, and firewalls must allow the chosen port.
localServer.hint.localUnavailable: A local network address is not available right now.
localServer.hint.localDisabled: Local network pairing is disabled in LibreOffice settings.
localServer.hint.noRoute: No pairing route is currently available.
localServer.hint.relayDisabled: Relay pairing is disabled in LibreOffice settings.
localServer.hint.relayMissing: Set a relay server address to pair over the relay.
localServer.hint.relayUnavailable: Relay pairing is unavailable in this build.
localServer.hint.restart: Save and restart the remote to apply the new listener settings.
localServer.hint.route: Scan the QR code to pair over {route}.
localServer.hint.start: Start the remote from LibreOffice to generate a QR code.
localServer.hint.tunnelDisabled: Tunnel fallback is disabled in LibreOffice settings.
localServer.hint.tunnelStarting: Tunnel fallback is starting. Wait for the public URL, then scan the QR code again.
localServer.hint.tunnelUnavailable: Tunnel fallback is not available in this build.
localServer.listener.startFailed: Could not start the remote server on ports {start}-{end}
office.error.copyable: Something went wrong. Copy these details when reporting the issue:
office.copyUrl.failed: Could not copy the pairing URL automatically.
office.copyUrl.unavailable: Start the remote to create a pairing URL.
office.help.errorsBody: If a command fails, the extension shows a copyable diagnostic popup. Reinstall the latest OXT when LibreOffice loads stale extension code.
office.help.intro: Use Slide Show > Start Remote to open a QR code. Scan it with your phone; the popup closes after the phone connects.
office.help.modesBody: Local network is best for same Wi-Fi and phone hotspots. LocalTunnel creates a temporary public URL when local networking is blocked. Direct IPv6 requires public IPv6 on both devices and open firewalls. Relay Server is for your own relay and forwards encrypted traffic only.
office.help.pairingBody: Remote Settings chooses the mode used by Start Remote. If the QR scanner fails, use Copy URL in the QR popup and open that URL on the phone.
office.help.title: Remote Help
office.settings.title: Remote Settings
office.start.title: Start Remote
resource.error.notBundled: Packaged resource is not available in this extension: {name}
resource.error.unsafeArchive: Packaged resource contains an unsafe path: {name}
protocol.error.frameMissingKey: Encrypted relay frame is missing a key id.
protocol.error.frameMissingNonce: Encrypted relay frame is missing a nonce.
protocol.error.framePayloadObject: Relay frame payload must be a JSON object.
protocol.error.frameSessionMismatch: Encrypted relay frame is bound elsewhere.
protocol.error.frameUnknownKey: No relay key is available for this frame.
protocol.error.frameUnknownKind: Encrypted relay frame has an unknown kind.
protocol.error.helloMissingPublicKey: Relay hello is missing a P-256 public key.
protocol.error.helloNonceMismatch: Relay hello nonce does not match the pending key.
protocol.error.helloSessionMismatch: Relay hello is bound to another session.
protocol.error.messageJson: Relay message is not valid JSON.
protocol.error.messageObject: Relay message must be a JSON object.
protocol.error.missingNegotiatedKey: No relay key has been negotiated yet.
protocol.error.payloadJson: Decrypted relay payload is not valid UTF-8 JSON.
protocol.error.rotatePluginOnly: Only the plugin role can rotate relay send keys.
qrcode.error.border: Invalid border value (was {size}, expected 0 or larger than that)
qrcode.error.boxSize: Invalid box size (was {size}, expected larger than 0)
qrcode.error.codeLengthOverflow: Code length overflow. Data size ({size}) > size available ({available})
qrcode.error.dataMode: Provided data can not be represented in mode {mode}
qrcode.error.embeddedImageCorrection: Error correction level must be ERROR_CORRECT_H if an embedded image is provided
qrcode.error.maskPatternRange: Mask pattern should be in range(8) (got {pattern})
relay.error.binaryUnsupported: Relay messages must be UTF-8 JSON text.
relay.error.errorMissingCode: Relay error messages need an error code.
relay.error.errorMissingMessage: Relay error messages need an error message.
relay.error.frameKindForRole: Encrypted relay frame kind is not allowed for this role.
relay.error.frameMissingKey: Encrypted relay frames need a key id.
relay.error.frameMissingKind: Encrypted relay frames need a kind.
relay.error.frameMissingNonce: Encrypted relay frames need a nonce.
relay.error.helloMissingKey: Relay hello is missing a key id.
relay.error.helloMissingNonce: Relay hello is missing a plugin nonce.
relay.error.helloMissingPublicKey: Relay hello is missing a P-256 public key.
relay.error.helloMissingRole: Relay hello is missing a role.
relay.error.helloPluginOnly: Only the plugin may publish relay hello messages.
relay.error.helloRoleMismatch: Relay hello role does not match the websocket role.
relay.error.invalidEnvelopeType: Relay messages must use hello, frame, or error envelopes.
relay.error.invalidJson: Relay messages must be valid JSON.
relay.error.jsonObject: Relay messages must be JSON objects.
relay.error.messageSessionMismatch: Relay message is bound to another session.
relay.error.messageTooLarge: Relay message exceeds the configured size limit.
relay.error.noListenSockets: No listen sockets could be opened.
relay.error.plainErrorPluginOnly: Only the plugin may publish plaintext relay errors.
relay.error.pluginHelloRequired: The plugin must publish a relay hello before encrypted frames.
relay.error.pluginKeyMismatch: Plugin frame key id does not match the active relay hello.
relay.error.pluginNotReady: The relay plugin is not ready for encrypted commands yet.
relay.error.rateLimit: Relay connection exceeded the message rate limit.
relay.error.runtimeConfigObject: Relay runtime config must be a JSON object.
relay.error.runtimeHostV4: Relay runtime config host_v4 must be a string.
relay.error.runtimeHostV6: Relay runtime config host_v6 must be a string.
relay.error.runtimePort: Relay runtime config port must be an integer.
relay.error.runtimeSessionTtl: Relay runtime config session_ttl must be an integer.
relay.error.sessionCapacity: Relay session capacity has been reached.
relay.error.tooManyPhones: Too many phones connected to this session.
relayClient.error.handshakeVerification: Relay websocket handshake could not be verified.
relayClient.error.missingHost: Relay websocket URL is missing a host.
localtunnel.error.hostMissing: Tunnel host must include a host.
localtunnel.error.invalidResponse: Tunnel server returned an invalid response.
state.emptyDeck: This Impress document does not contain any slides.
state.noDocument: Open an Impress presentation to use the remote.
state.notImpress: The active LibreOffice document is not an Impress presentation.
state.pausedLast: Presentation paused on the last slide
state.runningLast: Presentation running on the last slide
web.connectingRelay: Connecting to LibreOffice through the relay...
web.directHandshakeMismatch: Encrypted local/direct handshake belongs to another session.
web.directLinkRequired: Encrypted local/direct mode requires the full pairing link from LibreOffice.
web.directPayloadMalformed: Encrypted local/direct slide payload is malformed.
web.directSlideInvalid: Encrypted local/direct slide payload is invalid.
web.directStateInvalid: Encrypted local/direct state payload is invalid.
web.offline: Remote is offline. Start it again from LibreOffice.
web.offlineRelay: Remote is offline. Open the full relay pairing link from LibreOffice again.
web.relayLinkRequired: Relay mode requires the full pairing link from LibreOffice.
web.relayNotReady: Relay connection is not ready yet.
web.relayOpenFullLink: Open the full relay pairing link from LibreOffice.
web.secureRelayUnsupported: This browser does not support secure relay mode.
web.webCryptoDirectUnsupported: This browser does not expose Web Crypto required for encrypted local/direct mode.
web.webCryptoTransportUnsupported: This browser does not expose Web Crypto required for encrypted remote transport.
